title: Moving Out | #shorts
full_text: Brij, why are you stressed out constantly? I'm the world's leading almost therapist. I can fix whatever your problem is. Tell me right now. Go. >> Actually, I think I found a solution. After speaking to all my uncles, cousins, grandparents in India, I've realized something they all had in common. They all moved out when they were 18. I'm now 19 and I'm thinking I will move out. And not only will I be able to pay for full rent, I can split it with my girlfriend. >> What? What cousin of yours said they moved out at 18? Nobody here. that their 50-year-old cousin staying home with their parents and you are not living with your girlfriend. Is that what you're trying to suggest? >> I'm trying to suggest that. You know something? Dad moved out when he was also 18. >> No. Dad moved out nowhere. He's still attached to your his mother's hip. And do you know what they say about if you live with your girlfriend, do you know what they say? Why will anybody buy the cow if you can get the milk for free? Indian. That's a deep thinking saying and you need to figure it out with me in more therapy sessions right here.
